summary: Tested Beezy Home Services full stack. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases pass for all 5 resources (root, services, bookings, pilot, shield, investor) including validation. Frontend: Landing + Investors render; Booking 3-step flow, Pilot form, Shield reserve form, and Investor contact form all submit successfully and persist via the public preview URL.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 on create. Functional but not REST-idiomatic.
Using same path for GET (list) as POST (create) is fine but unconventional; consider /api/shield-subscriptions, /api/investor-inquiries.

ui_bugs.issue: Uses a native <select> instead of the shadcn Select component. Renders fine but is inconsistent with the slot picker (shadcn) and inferior look-and-feel on the rest of the form. Also produces a React hydration warning because <option> contains an auto-injected <span> wrapper from the build tagger.
Mobile hamburger button does not expose data-testid=nav-mobile-toggle as documented in the request. Add it for testability.

issues: The Emergent badge (bottom-left) overlaps the '60 min RESPONSE' stat tile on small screens, partially hiding text.

action_items: Replace native <select> in BookingWidget with shadcn Select for visual + a11y consistency and to silence the <option><span> hydration warning.
Add data-testid=nav-mobile-toggle to the Navbar hamburger button.
Optionally return 201 from POST create endpoints.
Adjust mobile hero spacing so the Emergent badge does not overlap the stats row.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: All POST creates return 200 (FastAPI default). Use status_code=201 for create endpoints.

server.py: GET and POST share the same path (/api/shield-subscribe, /api/investor-contact). Works, but list endpoints should be plural and distinct (/api/shield-subscriptions, /api/investor-inquiries).
server.py: No pagination or auth on GET list endpoints — they expose all submissions publicly. Acceptable for MVP but flag as data-leak risk before launch.
server.py uses on_event('shutdown') — deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handlers.
BookingWidget should use the shadcn Select for service to match the rest of the design system.
seed_data_creation: Test rows prefixed TEST_ created in collections: bookings, pilot_signups, shield_subscriptions, investor_inquiries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is /app/backend/tests/test_beezy_api.py (pytest, 8 cases). All endpoints stable. UI flows work via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. If main agent migrates BookingWidget to shadcn Select, retest by clicking [data-testid=booking-service-select] then a [role=option] entry. Mobile menu toggle currently has no data-testid; if added as nav-mobile-toggle, the existing Playwright script will pick it up.
rca of the issue: Native <select><option> with the build tagger injecting <span> wrappers triggers React's 'span cannot be a child of option' hydration warning. Fix: switch BookingWidget service picker to shadcn Select (already used for slot).
